headline: Is Waters (WAT) Trading Speed For Durability With Its New ARES-G3 Productivity Push?
summary: Waters Corporation recently launched the ARES-G3 Rheometer under its TA Instruments line, a next-generation system that speeds rheological testing by up to 80% while capturing up to 25,000 data points per second and reducing user calibrations to improve accuracy and throughput. This launch, alongside Waters’ recent quarter of higher earnings and net sales with positive 2026 guidance, highlights the company’s focus on faster, higher-quality analytical workflows that can enhance customer...
